name: codex-video-pipeline-plugin
description: Codex CLI plugin for AI video projects. Version 1.1.3 uses a clear marketplace wrapper layout: the outer codex-video-intake-plugin directory is the install package, and the real plugin lives under plugins/codex-video-pipeline-plugin. Stage 00-09 framework is included; GPT Image 2 and ComfyUI are roadmap integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Guided video pipeline with Stage 00-09 framework and provider integration roadmap.
interface.longDescription: A Codex CLI skill pack for an AI video production pipeline. The outer package is a local marketplace wrapper; the real plugin root is plugins/codex-video-pipeline-plugin. Actual GPT Image 2 and ComfyUI calls are still provider-roadmap items, not completed production integrations.
defaultPrompt: Use $video-production-pipeline as the default user entry point. For follow-up development, first read CODEX_START_HERE.md at the package root, then read docs/00_CODEX_MASTER_PLAN.md. Do not implement random changes before summarizing the current status, target stage, touched files, tests, and acceptance gates. Keep all outputs inside video_projects/<project_id>/. For Stages 05-09, never claim generated or delivered success unless required files exist, have non-zero size where applicable, and the corresponding manifest validates in final mode. This package includes provider integration plans only; do not claim real GPT Image 2 or ComfyUI integration is complete until scripts, config, tests, and real output evidence exist.
